name: Ravine Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter together until smooth.
2. Allow mixture to cool completely.
3. Gradually add sugar, eggs, flour, vanilla, and chopped nuts. Beat well until combined.
4. Pour batter evenly into a greased 8x8 inch pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until set but still slightly soft on top.
6. Test with a toothpick; it should come out with a few moist crumbs but not be completely doughy. The brownies will be soft and chewy when finished baking.
